claim: Everything is a function—treat every step in your agent pipeline (inputs/outputs) as a composable function for modularity and reusability
actionable: Design agent workflows with explicit input/output functions at each step; avoid coupling; enable reuse of individual steps.
source_title: Using Apple Vision Pro & LLM Agents to Code Youtube Automation Tools (Proof Of Concept)

claim: Use the right tool for the job: not every step in an agent pipeline needs an LLM; use code for deterministic tasks (transcription, resizing)
actionable: Separate LLM-powered steps from deterministic code steps; use fast-whisper for transcription instead of calling an agent.
source_title: Using Apple Vision Pro & LLM Agents to Code Youtube Automation Tools (Proof Of Concept)

claim: Build reusable, modular building blocks in your agent system; you will encounter similar problems repeatedly in different variants
actionable: Break your agent pipelines into small, isolated modules (e.g., create_title, create_description); design them to work independently.
source_title: Using Apple Vision Pro & LLM Agents to Code Youtube Automation Tools (Proof Of Concept)

claim: Use typer library to build clean CLI applications for agent workflows; enables running individual functions or entire pipelines
actionable: Use typer + poetry to structure agent commands; enable users to run poetry run app command subcommand or the full pipeline.
source_title: Using Apple Vision Pro & LLM Agents to Code Youtube Automation Tools (Proof Of Concept)

claim: Ask great questions to yield great results; the quality of your agent results depends on how well you structure the problem and inputs
actionable: Before building an agent, define the core questions it must answer; use these to structure inputs, outputs, and the overall workflow.
source_title: Using Apple Vision Pro & LLM Agents to Code Youtube Automation Tools (Proof Of Concept)

claim: A proof of concept validates your plan and principles before investing heavily; it proves business value before productionization
actionable: Build POCs to demonstrate value; use results to justify investment in productionization and team adoption.
source_title: Using Apple Vision Pro & LLM Agents to Code Youtube Automation Tools (Proof Of Concept)

claim: During review step in agent workflows, be the curator of AI-generated content; iterate on what didn't work (e.g., thumbnails, descriptions)
actionable: Include human-in-the-loop review before publishing; use feedback to iterate on specific agent steps rather than re-running the full pipeline.
source_title: Using Apple Vision Pro & LLM Agents to Code Youtube Automation Tools (Proof Of Concept)
